Each entry exercises a real production primitive (i18n.Translator, config.Load+Validate, executor.Action serialisation) byte-preserving non-ASCII input through the full pipeline. Per Article XI §11.9 every PASS reported by the runner is backed by positive runtime evidence captured during execution.
